messages.content: How do I reset my password?
Go to Settings → Security → Reset password, then follow the emailed link. The link expires in 30 minutes.
My invoice looks wrong this month.
I can help. Open Billing → Invoices, select the invoice, and click 'Report an issue'. Include the line item you're disputing and our team responds within one business day.
How do I invite a teammate?
Open Team → Members → Invite, enter their work email, pick a role, and send. They'll get an email to join your workspace.
Can I export my data?
Yes. Go to Settings → Data → Export, choose CSV or JSON, and we'll email a download link when it's ready — usually within a few minutes.
The app is slow today.
Sorry about that. First check status.example.com for incidents. If all green, try clearing your cache and reloading; if it persists, send us your account id and region and we'll investigate.
How do I cancel my subscription?
Open Billing → Plan → Cancel subscription. You keep access until the end of the current billing period, and no further charges are made.
Do you support single sign-on?
Yes, on Business and Enterprise plans. Go to Settings → Security → SSO to configure SAML or OIDC with your identity provider.
I didn't get my verification email.
Check your spam folder first. If it's not there, request a new one from the login screen — 'Resend verification'. Allow a few minutes for delivery.
How do I change my billing email?
Open Billing → Settings → Billing contact, update the email, and save. Future invoices go to the new address.
Is my data encrypted?
Yes — data is encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest (AES-256). Enterprise plans can bring their own encryption key.
